meta.note: Report three-tile model, seven slide sections folded onto three cards. 01 OPEN = Aim + Basis (objective line + where the information came from). 02 ARGUE = Findings, three building heading-lines (single-direction; feature signposts carry _join; support footnote reason/example/result/compare/contrast). 03 CLOSE = Recommendation + Conclusion. REGISTER: formal and IMPERSONAL — the 'view' pool is impersonal reporting verbs (it was generally felt that / respondents indicated that), NOT personal reaction. Intro STATES AN AIM, never a thesis or verdict. Types are report SUBJECTS.

featurePlan.note: first=General view (keyGen), open=Praising (keyPos), standout=Criticising (keyNeg). Balanced report body.

background: The main objective of this report is to assess ...
This report aims to provide a summary regarding ...
This report is an evaluation/assessment of ...
This report aims to provide a detailed summary of ...
The purpose of this report is to examine ...
This report is intended to give an overview of ...
The aim of this report is to describe and evaluate ...

standout.t: By far the worst aspect, however, is that
Less satisfactory, however, was the fact that
One major concern expressed was that
The chief criticism, however, was that
It is, in some respects, far from ideal, given that

many of those surveyed noted that
this is mainly due to the fact that
method: The report is based on my personal views and experience.
The information was collected through a survey/questionnaire conducted among ...

This report draws on data collected over ...

drawing on feedback gathered from staff and students,

keyNeg: opening hours are too limited to suit many users
certain areas are in clear need of modernisation
demand often exceeds the space available at peak times
some of the equipment is outdated and due for replacement
